sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107418" key="u(pere/gxristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερέγχριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for smearing on above,</tr_> of an eye-salve, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.</author> </bibl> Fel.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
